name: sysdesign
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'uv sync --all-packages && cd services/agent-ts && npm ci'
postStartCommand: echo 'Dev container ready. Postgres is a sibling at db:5432 (no host port). First time: moon run core:db-init, then moon run core:drills (from the repo root). Node $(node --version) is on PATH for services/agent-ts.'
